findings.evidence: `roadmap/TauCetiRoadmap/Exchangeability/README.md:376-377` lists `shiftInvariantSigma_measurable_shift_eq` and `shiftInvariant_implies_shiftInvariantMeasurable`; `rg` finds only `theorem measurable_shift_shiftInvariantSigma` at line 97 and `theorem measurable_shiftInvariantSigma_of_comp_shift_eq` at line 103 in this PR.
findings.fix: Rename or add public aliases for `shiftInvariantSigma_measurable_shift_eq` and `shiftInvariant_implies_shiftInvariantMeasurable` with the same statements intended by the roadmap.
findings.issue: The shift-invariant sigma API exposes the shift measurability and invariant-function consequence under non-roadmap names (`measurable_shift_shiftInvariantSigma`, `measurable_shiftInvariantSigma_of_comp_shift_eq`) instead of the target names.

summary: The characteristic lemmas are present, but two roadmap-facing public names are still missing, so downstream code following the target API will not find them.
